Only content
which differs
from the above
letters are the
details of the
PFA's solicitor,
letter date, and
reference
number (each
shown right).
However, the
introductory
paragraph
summarising the
PFA's offence
and associated
sentence is
unique in each
letter. The
located
(unsigned)
copies of these
letters are
disclosed to the
Inquiry therefore.

Advocates,

Street,
Newton
Abbot,
TQ12 2BN
